title: strategy_002_bollinger_squeeze_breakout
author: manual-transcript-drop
summary_bullets: STRATEGY: Bollinger Squeeze Breakout ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Low volatility compression about to expand TYPE: Volatility expansion / breakout CONCEPT: Markets cycle between low and high volatility.
When Bollinger Bands contract to their narrowest point (a “squeeze”), a big move is building.
We detect the squeeze using Bollinger Band width, confirm breakout direction using MACD and OBV, and ride the expansion.
This catches the start of major moves that other strategies miss because they wait for trend confirmation after the move has already started.

INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - squeeze detection and breakout levels - Bollinger Band Width: (Upper - Lower) / Middle - measures squeeze tightness - MACD (fast 12, slow 26, signal 9) - directional bias during squeeze - OBV - volume accumulation/distribution during squeeze reveals hidden intent - ADX (period 14) - confirms low volatility (ADX < 20 = squeeze, ADX rising = expansion starting) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss sizing SQUEEZE DETECTION: - Calculate BB Width
Squeeze was active (at least 5 bars of compressed BB Width) 2.
Price closes above upper Bollinger Band (breakout) 3.
MACD histogram is positive (momentum confirms upward direction) 4.
OBV > SMA(OBV, 20) (volume was accumulating during squeeze) 5.
ADX starts rising (current ADX > ADX from 2 bars ago) ENTRY SHORT: 1.

extracted_rules: When Bollinger Bands contract to their narrowest point (a “squeeze”), a big move is building.

INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - squeeze detection and breakout levels - Bollinger Band Width: (Upper - Lower) / Middle - measures squeeze tightness - MACD (fast 12, slow 26, signal 9) - directional bias during squeeze - OBV - volume accumulation/distribution during squeeze reveals hidden intent - ADX (period 14) - confirms low volatility (ADX < 20 = squeeze, ADX rising = expansion starting) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss sizing SQUEEZE DETECTION: - Calculate BB Width

ADX starts rising EXIT RULES: - Take profit: 3.0x ATR(14) from entry (squeeze breakouts produce big moves) - Stop loss: Middle Bollinger Band (SMA 20) — if price falls back to middle, the breakout failed - Alternative stop: 1.5x ATR, whichever is tighter - Trailing stop: After 2.0 ATR in profit, trail at 1.5 ATR behind price - Time stop: If 3.0 ATR target not reached in 25 candles, exit at market - Max hold: 40 candles RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 1.25% of account (higher conviction setup,
